class.name: nav2_costmap_2d/TerrainGlobalLayer
class.description: Layer that continuously merges terrain/sterling costmap into the global costmap

class.name: custom_costmap_layers/RingSlopeFilterLayer
class.description: Preprocesses an organized PointCloud2 to suppress uneven ground returns by comparing dz/dxy between adjacent lidar rings. Republishes the filtered cloud for downstream STVL marking.
